sections.label: Verse 1
lines: When enemies rise like shadows in the night
Watching my steps, waiting to strike
But I'll lift my eyes to something higher
Your promise burns like holy fire

sections.label: Chorus
lines: When I'm afraid,
I trust in You Every tear
You've counted, every prayer rings true
Though armies gather, though storms break through
When I'm afraid, I trust in You

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: They twist my words like tangled thorns
Try to break my spirit till the morning dawns
But You've been keeping count of my wandering ways
Storing each tear like precious rain

sections.label: Chorus
lines: When I'm afraid,
I trust in You Every tear
You've counted, every prayer rings true
Though armies gather, though storms break through
When I'm afraid, I trust in You

sections.label: Bridge
lines: What can flesh do to me?
When heaven holds my destiny
I'm walking in the light of life
Dancing through the darkest night

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Now I will fulfill my vows to You
With songs of praise breaking through
For You have delivered my soul from death
My feet from falling, given me breath

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: In the courts of glory,
I'll tell Your story
How You turned my mourning into dancing
Every step of faith, every battle faced
Became a testimony of Your grace

sections.label: Chorus
lines: When I'm afraid,
I trust in You Every tear
You've counted, every prayer rings true
Though armies gather, though storms break through
When I'm afraid, I trust in You
When I'm afraid... I trust in You...
